title: Alien Dictionary
prompt: Implement `alien_order(words)` in `alien_order.py`. Given a list of `words` sorted lexicographically according to an unknown alien alphabet, return a string of the alphabet's letters in order. If no valid ordering exists (a contradiction is implied by the input, or a longer word precedes its own prefix), return the empty string. The returned string must contain every distinct letter that appears in `words`. Do not modify `test_alien_order.py`.
